allow: Bash(Rscript -e "deps <- tools::package_dependencies\(c\('DALEX','iml','lime','iBreakDown','modelStudio','fairmodels','pdp','ggplot2','yardstick','probably','pROC','broom'\), which='all'\); for \(pkg in names\(deps\)\) { if \('ggrepel' %in% deps[[pkg]]\) print\(paste\(pkg, 'depends on ggrepel'\)\) }")
Bash(Rscript -e "options\(repos = c\(CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'\)\); deps <- tools::package_dependencies\('DALEX', recursive=FALSE\); print\(names\(deps[[1]]\)\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "options\(repos = c\(CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'\)\); deps <- tools::package_dependencies\('iml', recursive=FALSE\); print\(names\(deps[[1]]\)\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "options\(repos = c\(CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'\)\); deps <- tools::package_dependencies\('lime', recursive=FALSE\); print\(names\(deps[[1]]\)\)")

Bash(Rscript -e 'options\(repos = c\(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"\)\); ip <- as.data.frame\(installed.packages\(\)\); if \(nrow\(ip\) > 0\) { matches <- grep\("ggrepel|mixOmics", ip$Imports, ignore.case=TRUE\); if\(length\(matches\) > 0\) print\(ip[matches, c\("Package", "Imports"\)]\) } else print\("No packages installed"\)')

Bash(Rscript -e 'options\(repos = c\(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"\)\); ip <- as.data.frame\(installed.packages\(\)\); imports_str <- paste\(ip$Imports, collapse=" "\); matches <- grep\("ggrepel", strsplit\(imports_str, ","\)[[1]], value=TRUE\); print\(paste\("Searching through all packages..."\)\); for\(i in 1:nrow\(ip\)\) { if\(!is.na\(ip[i,"Imports"]\) && grepl\("ggrepel", ip[i,"Imports"]\)\) { print\(paste\(ip[i,"Package"], "imports ggrepel"\)\) } }')

Bash(Rscript -e 'options\(repos = c\(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"\)\); ip <- as.data.frame\(installed.packages\(\)\); for\(i in 1:nrow\(ip\)\) { imports <- ip[i,"Imports"]; pkg <- ip[i,"Package"]; if\(length\(imports\) > 0 && !is.na\(imports\)\) { if\(grepl\("ggrepel", imports\)\) { print\(paste\(pkg, "imports ggrepel"\)\) } } }')

Bash(Rscript -e "options\(repos=c\(CRAN='https://cloud.r-project.org'\)\); ip <- as.data.frame\(installed.packages\(\)\); for\(i in 1:nrow\(ip\)\) { if\(!is.na\(ip[i,5]\)\) if\(grepl\('ggrepel', ip[i,5]\)\) cat\(ip[i,1], ' imports ggrepel\\n'\) }")
Bash(R --vanilla --slave -e "options\(repos=c\(CRAN='https://cloud.r-project.org'\)\); ip <- installed.packages\(\); idx <- grep\('ggrepel', ip[,5]\); print\(ip[idx,1]\)")
